title: Implement Eval Layer V1 schema, types, and API foundation
summary: Added persistent eval and learning tables, mission-control migration 009, typed eval contracts, eval service logic, and new eval APIs for spec CRUD, run execution, task history, and agent performance profile access.
changes: Added eval spec/run/performance and learning question/answer schema objects to mission-control DB baseline.
Added migration 009 to create eval and learning tables for existing databases.
Added evaluation status and attribution contracts in shared types.
Implemented eval utility service with scoring heuristics and rolling profile aggregation.
Exposed eval API surface for spec CRUD, run execution, and result retrieval.
Marked EXP-010a complete in task board.
risks: Current scorer is heuristic and intentionally simple; rubric-sensitive accuracy work remains in EXP-010b/010c.
No UI panel yet for eval data; APIs are ready but presentation is still pending.
rollback: Revert migration 009 and remove /api/evals routes and eval service if foundation needs redesign.
